title: Front Office Manager - Vistara - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Vistara - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Vistara is actively seeking a talented and motivated Front Office Manager to join our dynamic team in Jodhpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Vistara:
Vistara is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in OTA Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vistara!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
